basic_details.job_title: Panjab University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Panjab University is recruiting for 1 Project Associate-I position on a temporary basis.

qualification.details: Emoluments: Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + 18% HRA for three years as per DBT or Panjab University guidelines.
qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Biophysics / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Chemistry / allied subjects with minimum 55% marks.
qualification.experience: Experience with peptide, in silico work, antimicrobial work, and nanotechnology.

how_to_apply: Applications along with complete bio-data and attested copies of certificates showing qualifications and experience should reach the undersigned by 08.07.2026 either by post or email at [email protected].
Dr. Ravi Pratap Barnwal Principal Investigator Department of Biophysics Panjab University, Chandigarh – 160014
Candidates should mention their email address and phone number in the bio-data.
important_instructions: The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Initial appointment is for one year and extendable up to 3 years based on performance.

all_official_links.label: Download Panjab University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Department of Biophysics, Panjab University has invited applications for the position of Project Associate-I in the project entitled “Development of novel molecules for functional Parathyroid tumor(s) imaging by targeting calcium sensing receptor” funded by DBT, Government of India. Download Panjab University Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Project Associate Vacancy Details
Panjab University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Emoluments: Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + 18% HRA for three years as per DBT or Panjab University guidelines.

rows.details: M.Sc. in Biophysics / Biochemistry / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Chemistry / allied subjects with minimum 55% marks.
Candidates with UGC-NET / GATE / PU PhD (Biophysics) / other national entrance tests conducted by Government of India will be preferred.
Experience with peptide, in silico work, antimicrobial work, and nanotechnology.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Panjab University Project Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications along with complete bio-data and attested copies of certificates showing qualifications and experience should reach the undersigned by 08.07.2026 either by post or email at [email protected] . Dr. Ravi Pratap Barnwal Principal Investigator Department of Biophysics Panjab University, Chandigarh – 160014 Candidates should mention their email address and phone number in the bio-data.

content_sections.heading: Panjab University Project Associate Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The post is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. Initial appointment is for one year and extendable up to 3 years based on performance.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Panjab University Project Associate 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 08th July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Associate-I at Panjab University?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive Rs. 31,000/- p.m. + 18% HRA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for Panjab University Project Associate in Biophysics?
faq.answer: M.Sc. in Biophysics, Biochemistry, Microbiology, Biotechnology, Chemistry or allied subjects with minimum 55% marks.

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the Project Associate position at Panjab University?
faq.answer: Initial appointment is for 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for Panjab University Project Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Send complete bio-data and attested copies of certificates by post or email to [email protected] by the deadline.

faq.question: Q6. Is NET/GATE qualification required for Panjab University Project Associate?
faq.answer: It is not mandatory but candidates with UGC-NET/GATE or equivalent will be preferred.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for Project Associate-I at Panjab University Chandigarh?
faq.answer: Maximum 30 years.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable skills for the Parathyroid Tumor Imaging Project?
faq.answer: Experience in peptide synthesis, in silico work, antimicrobial studies, and nanotechnology.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Panjab University Project Associate position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and co-terminus with the DBT project.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Panjab University Project Associate Recruitment?
faq.answer: Refer to the advertisement issued by the Department of Biophysics, Panjab University, Chandigarh.
